name: SBI Card MILES PRIME

domestic: 8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits every year, capped at 2 visits per quarter.
1 additional domestic airport lounge visit is unlocked on every Rs 1 lakh spend, capped at 12 additional visits per year.
international: Complimentary Priority Pass membership worth $99 is provided for the first 2 years.
4 complimentary international airport lounge visits every year, capped at 2 visits per quarter.
Post complimentary visits, a usage fee of $27 plus taxes is applicable.

joiningBenefits: 3,000 Travel Credits on spends of Rs 60,000 within 60 days of card issuance, credited on payment of joining fee

milestones.label: 10,000 bonus Travel Credits on annual spends of Rs 8 lakh

milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus Travel Credits on annual spends of Rs 8 lakh
additionalBenefits: Flight cancellation cover up to 6 times per year at Rs 3,500 each
Lost card liability cover up to Rs 1 lakh
Air accident cover up to Rs 1 crore
Loss or delay of checked-in baggage and travel-document covers as listed in SBI Card terms
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
additionalDetails: 1 Travel Credit = Re 1 for air mile or hotel point conversion
1 Travel Credit = Rs 0.50 for travel bookings
1 Travel Credit = Rs 0.25 for Shop & Smile product catalogue
internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card MILES PRIME product page and current MILES PRIME T&C booklet on 2026-06-08.
The product page currently lists Mastercard and RuPay lounge-program references for domestic lounge access.
The card is audited from official SBI sources but is not yet marked as manually verified by user.
